title: ononis baetica subsp. donanensis
intro: Ononis baetica subsp. donanensis, also known as Donana spiny restharrow, is a plant species within the Fabaceae family, specifically belonging to the genus Ononis. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in the treatment of various health issues. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting potential antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. In herbal preparations, Ononis baetica subsp. donanensis is often used as an infusion or tincture, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
